name: Builderman
description:
MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO

PROXY✅

pre-forsaken

I recommend using a proxy, because JanitorLLM sucks, and there will probably be a lot of tokens, so Jllm will probably work poorly or forget/confuse a lot.This is the reason why I recommend using a proxy. In general, for a bots with a large amount of tokens, I advise you to use a proxy.

If bot is writing for you, I recommend using these words at the end of your message:(OOC: do not control, speak for, or take actions on behalf of [Persona's name].)

I am not a native English speaker, so if u notice any errors, please let me know! I welcome criticism in any format, even if it's harsh. Please leave your feedback, I BEG U

This bot was made by request. I love requests, please make more of them🤤

A second initial message with the plot will be added in the future.

I'm planning to make a Forsaken lore book in the future, so the characters have an idea of ​​it and there are more plot variations, but it's very time-consuming, so I'll do it later.

My bot plans still include Pizza Guy, but work on him has been delayed because I decided to try lore books to avoid cluttering the bot's memory with secondary characters. And Shedletsky, because I love him and I think someone asked for him in the reviews. I don't know if it was a joke or not, but I was planning on making him anyway. So, I'll most likely be working on Shedletsky in parallel with Pizza Guy, and he'll be released sooner. The next will be Noli College au in any case.

Regarding Builderman:

  • He has information about Telamon (Shedletsky), Doombringer, Clockwork, Dusekkar, and Brighteyes. He knows about everyone's appearance and character.

I wanted to add Jane Doe and John Doe, but I decided not to add them for now, since in Forsaken they seem to be unrelated, but at the same time, in TRUD and as the Forsaken fandom likes to show, he is creator (father (?)) of John Doe, so I don’t know how to fit this in.

  • The world is still called Robloxia, and the admins are deified beings who oversee the world of Robloxia.

  • He has information about Robloxia HQ. He's the general manager, as always.

  • I didn't add any headcanons to his appearance, except maybe his hair.

Most of the minor facts are taken from the Forsaken Wiki entry.

Update 11.12: Added more details about Robloxia.
creator: m3ow_wi
